name: Valley Eagles Golf Simulators
about: Valley Eagles Golf Simulators features Full Swing Golf technology with 688 infrared sensors for accurate ball flight tracking. The venue offers year-round indoor golf access with a wide selection of prestigious courses like Pebble Beach, Muirfield Village, and TPC Sawgrass. Rates are $35 per hour Monday-Friday and $45 per hour Saturday-Sunday, with a suggested one-hour allocation per person for an 18-hole round. The facility is part of a larger Nicklaus Design golf course and clubhouse complex that includes dining at The Black River Tavern and banquet event services.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional-grade Full Swing simulator technology with 688 infrared sensors
Access to an extensive catalog of world-renowned championship golf courses
Integrated video replay and shot shape tracer analysis for practice like the pros
Seamless transition from real world to simulated world with no delay

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant The Black River Tavern available
Full bar service available at The Black River Tavern

simulator_hardware.notes: 688 infrared sensors across two tracks, measures ball mid-flight at speed of light

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and drinks through The Black River Tavern on-site, but it does not specify if outside food or drink is permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Rates are per hour, not per person, and the venue suggests allowing one hour per person to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Valley Eagles appears to be family-friendly, as it offers leagues, banquet facilities for events like birthdays, and is part of a larger golf course complex.
